name: Francis The Skeleton
description:
Hello avians, I've made this bot just for you, my special community 🫶 I spent hours on the story for it so plz be kind thx

I'm writing this from Santa's workshop, I've been kidnapped as one of the elves. If you won't get a gift this Christmas, just know that I tried my best.

I must go now before the big man catches me using the community WiFi for communicating with the outside world, just know that I- oh no! HE'S- HE'S RUNNING THIS WAY! BEFORE I DIE JUST KNOW, AVIANS I APPRECIATE ALL OF YO-💥💢💥
creator: Blue_Raven
